# FraudShield

> Catch forged pay stubs, bank statements, and invoices in seconds with a forensic fraud score — affordable, self-serve detection built for small operators.

FraudShield is affordable, self-serve AI document-fraud detection for the underserved: small lenders, independent landlords, gig-platform trust teams, and SMB finance staff. Upload a pay stub, bank statement, or invoice and get a forensic fraud score (0–100) in seconds, with an explained per-signal breakdown — metadata forensics, cross-document checks, and known-fraud-template matches.

## Features

- Upload a pay stub, bank statement, or invoice and receive a forensic fraud score in seconds.
- See a 0–100 fraud score with a per-signal breakdown explaining each forensic finding.
- Run a live sample scan on the landing page before signing up.
- Self-serve access — no enterprise sales call or contract.
- Optional API access for integrating fraud detection into your own workflow.
- Upgrade for higher scan volume when you hit the free limit.

## Who it's for

- Small and regional lenders and MCA brokers verifying applicant income documents.
- Independent landlords and property managers screening tenant pay stubs and bank statements.
- Gig-platform trust & safety teams checking submitted documents at scale.
- SMB finance and accounts-payable staff reviewing invoices.
